description: These numero uno casual shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and aggressive design highlights are a wardrobe essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with a skinny pair of jeans and throw on a tonal jacket for added style.UpperSuede and synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and styleStitched nubuck overlays for midfoot supportLace-up system with metal eyelets for customised Fit and extra stylePrinted branding on tongue for styleMidsoleFoam midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with terraced grooves and an upraised heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
